title: Credit Card Payoff Calculator - Minimum Payment Trap
description: Free credit card payoff calculator. See how long minimum payments take and how much extra payments save. Escape the minimum payment trap.
keywords: credit card payoff calculator, credit card payment calculator, minimum payment calculator, credit card interest, pay off credit card
intro: Calculate how long it takes to pay off your credit card. Compare minimum payments vs. fixed payments to see potential savings.

faq.q: Why are minimum payments a trap?
faq.a: Minimum payments (typically 1-3% of balance) mostly cover interest, meaning it can take 15-30 years to pay off a balance and cost 2-3x the original amount.

faq.q: How is credit card interest calculated?
faq.a: Credit card interest is calculated daily on your average daily balance. The daily rate is your APR divided by 365.

faq.q: Should I pay more than the minimum?
faq.a: Always pay more than the minimum if possible. Even small extra payments dramatically reduce total interest and payoff time.
